suggestions.issue: Slips section appears too short relative to overall body length
suggestions.fix: Increase slip length to approximately 25-30% of total body length to match catalog proportions

suggestions.issue: Shoulder section between slips and box end is too thick/prominent
suggestions.fix: Reduce shoulder height to create smoother transition - should be subtle step down rather than prominent ledge

suggestions.issue: Box end appears slightly too long compared to catalog drawing
suggestions.fix: Reduce Box End Length parameter from 2.5 to approximately 2.0-2.2 to better match catalog proportions

suggestions.issue: Bottom taper transition appears abrupt at box end
suggestions.fix: Ensure bottom taper creates smoother flare at exit - widen Bottom Taper parameter slightly to 0.5-0.6
